functions.name: abs
functions.description: Absolute value of x

functions.name: acos
functions.description: Arc cosine of x (radians)

functions.name: asin
functions.description: Arc sine of x (radians)

functions.name: atan
functions.description: Arc tangent of x (radians)

functions.name: atan2
functions.description: Arc tangent of y/x taking the sign of both into account (radians)

functions.name: ceil
functions.description: Smallest integer not less than x (returns int if it fits in 32 bits, else float)

functions.name: cos
functions.description: Cosine of x (radians)

functions.name: datetime
functions.description: Convert seconds-since-epoch to DateTime, or a "yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ss" string to DateTime

functions.name: degrees
functions.description: Convert radians to degrees

functions.name: drop
functions.description: Return array or string without its first n elements

functions.name: exists
functions.description: True if the object-model variable exists and is not null

functions.name: exp
functions.description: Natural exponent e^x

functions.name: fileexists
functions.description: True if the given file exists on the SD card

functions.name: fileread
functions.description: Read count elements from a CSV-like file, skipping the first skip elements, using sep as separator

functions.name: find
functions.description: Index of the first occurrence of needle (char or string) in haystack, -1 if not found

functions.name: floor
functions.description: Largest integer not greater than x (returns int if it fits in 32 bits, else float)

functions.name: isnan
functions.description: True if x is Not-a-Number

functions.name: log
functions.description: Natural logarithm of x

functions.name: max
functions.description: Largest of the given values (NaN if any argument is NaN)

functions.name: min
functions.description: Smallest of the given values (NaN if any argument is NaN)

functions.name: mod
functions.description: Remainder of a divided by b

functions.name: pow
functions.description: base raised to the power exp

functions.name: radians
functions.description: Convert degrees to radians

functions.name: random
functions.description: Random integer in [0, max-1]; max must be >= 1

functions.name: round
functions.description: Round x to nearest integer (rounds to even when exactly halfway); returns int if it fits in 32 bits

functions.name: sin
functions.description: Sine of x (radians)

functions.name: sqrt
functions.description: Square root of x

functions.name: square
functions.description: x * x

functions.name: take
functions.description: Return the first n elements of array or string

functions.name: tan
functions.description: Tangent of x (radians)

functions.name: vector
functions.description: Build an array of n elements each initialised to value

constants.name: iterations
constants.description: Number of completed iterations of the innermost while loop (0 during first iteration)

constants.name: line
constants.description: Line number of the currently executing command

constants.name: result
constants.description: 0 if the last G-/M-/T-code succeeded, 1 = warning, >= 2 = error

constants.name: input
constants.description: Numeric value returned by the last M291 input dialog (mode 4-7)

scopes.name: global
scopes.description: Global variables persisted for the current DCS/DSF session

scopes.name: var
scopes.description: Local variables of the current macro / job / trigger

scopes.name: param
scopes.description: Parameters passed to the current macro

objectModel.name: inputs
objectModel.description: Information about every available G/M/T-code channel

objectModel.name: plugins
objectModel.description: Dictionary of loaded plugins where each key is the plugin identifier

objectModel.name: sbc
objectModel.description: Information about the SBC which Duet Software Framework is running on. This is null if the system is operating in standalone mode

objectModel.name: sensors
objectModel.description: Information about connected sensors including Z-probes and endstops
